statement: In every magma, Equation 1017 (`x = y * ((z * w) * (u * w))`) implies Equation 2755 (`x = ((y * y) * (z * x)) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0155
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op z w) (op u w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op y y) (op z x)) z)
